module_info.docstring:
Citation extraction, resolution, validation, and confidence scoring.

Pure functions — no database I/O, no side effects beyond os.path.exists().

classes.name: Citation
classes.docstring: A reference extracted from a memory entry.

classes.name: CheckResult
classes.docstring: Result of validating a single citation.

functions.name: _is_excluded
functions.docstring: Check if a matched value is a known non-path pattern.

functions.name: extract_citations
functions.docstring: Extract file path and module references from entry content.

functions.name: resolve_citation
functions.docstring:
Resolve a citation path against the project root.

Returns the canonical resolved path, or None if:
- The path escapes the project boundary
- The path can't be resolved

functions.name: validate_citation
functions.docstring: Validate a citation by checking if the referenced artifact exists.

functions.name: compute_confidence
functions.docstring:
Compute entry confidence from citation checks and stability signals.

Additive model with hard clamp to [0.0, 1.0]:
- base: starting confidence (typically 0.5)
- Each check adds its confidence_delta (+0.3 valid, -0.4 broken, 0.0 unchecked)
- snapshot_count >= 5: +0.2 stability bonus
